name: High-p16 T3 2-week P1NP positive exploratory result
comparator: Untreated control within high-p16 T3 subgroup
arm_details: Highest tertile of baseline T cell p16_variant 5 mRNA levels; article notes limited power because the T3 subgroup had about 10 participants per study arm.

effect.raw_text: In the high-p16 T3 subgroup, serum P1NP increased at 2 weeks in D+Q relative to control by +34%; P=0.035.

analysis.comparison: D+Q versus untreated control in T3 subgroup
analysis.effect_note: Exploratory subgroup effect based on baseline T cell p16_variant 5 tertile.

provenance.note: Full-text exploratory subgroup paragraph and figure caption provide the effect, p-value, subgroup definition, and T3 sample size at 2 weeks.

statement: In an exploratory high-p16 T3 subgroup, D+Q increased serum P1NP versus untreated control at 2 weeks.
caveats: Exploratory subgroup analysis; do not generalize to the overall randomized comparison.
The article reports p-value and relative percent difference, but no CI, standard error, or variance.
T3 subgroup power was limited because each study arm had about 10 participants.
